\cvsection{ Summary }
\begin{cvparagraph}
Self-taught developer building autonomous multi-agent AI systems. Creator of JARVIS (24/7 personal multi-agent system) and an autonomous Polymarket trading bot. Strong in process automation with LLMs, IT support, and modern web/app stacks (Supabase, Twilio, Resend). EU citizen, B1 English, available for fully-remote async work.
\end{cvparagraph}
